name: Stealth reach: Crunchyroll anime browse
goal:
Navigate to the anime browsing section and list 5 popular or featured anime titles currently shown on the homepage or browse page.
Only use https://www.crunchyroll.com to achieve the task.

name: Stealth reach: APKPure app search
goal:
Use the site search to find "WhatsApp" and extract the latest version number and download count shown for the top result.
Only use https://apkpure.com to achieve the task.

name: Stealth reach: John Lewis commerce search
goal:
Use the product search function to look up "organic cotton towels" and extract the name and price of the top search result.
Only use https://www.johnlewis.com to achieve the task.

name: Stealth reach: Target product browse
goal:
Navigate to the Electronics section and list 3 featured or promoted products currently shown.
Only use https://www.target.com to achieve the task.

name: Stealth reach: Best Buy deals page
goal:
Navigate to the deals or top deals page and extract the name and discounted price of the first 3 deals listed.
Only use https://www.bestbuy.com to achieve the task.
